item.title: Plane Crash, Bimini Fire, Family Gun Violence
item.ns0:title: Plane Crash, Bimini Fire, Family Gun Violence
item.description:
Tonight on Our News, an aviation expert shares critical insights into the investigation process and prevention measures following the tragic Independence Day plane crash in North Andros. We delve into a local family's unthinkable heartbreak after losing two relatives to gun violence in just one week and bring you an update on the rebuilding efforts in Bimini after a devastating fire. Plus, find out why BPL customers are giving mixed reviews to a new utility rebate while Cable Bahamas fights a high-profile legal battle in a US court. Join us for these headlines, a look at the latest park restoration projects, and your complete sports and weather updates.
-----
Copyright Disclaimer under section 107 of the Copyright Act of 1976, allowance is made for "fair use" for purposes such as criticism, comment, news reporting, teaching, scholarship, education and research. Fair use is a use permitted by copyright statute that might otherwise be infringing.
item.ns1:encoded:
Tonight on Our News, an aviation expert shares critical insights into the investigation process and prevention measures following the tragic Independence Day plane crash in North Andros. We delve into a local family's unthinkable heartbreak after losing two relatives to gun violence in just one week and bring you an update on the rebuilding efforts in Bimini after a devastating fire. Plus, find out why BPL customers are giving mixed reviews to a new utility rebate while Cable Bahamas fights a high-profile legal battle in a US court. Join us for these headlines, a look at the latest park restoration projects, and your complete sports and weather updates.
-----

item.ns0:summary:
Tonight on Our News, an aviation expert shares critical insights into the investigation process and prevention measures following the tragic Independence Day plane crash in North Andros. We delve into a local family's unthinkable heartbreak after losing two relatives to gun violence in just one week and bring you an update on the rebuilding efforts in Bimini after a devastating fire. Plus, find out why BPL customers are giving mixed reviews to a new utility rebate while Cable Bahamas fights a high-profile legal battle in a US court. Join us for these headlines, a look at the latest park restoration projects, and your complete sports and weather updates.

item.ns0:author: Our News Bahamas
